name: Bolt Projects Holdings, Inc.
business: Bolt harnesses biotechnology to build biomaterials that aim to disrupt and transform high-volume consumer goods industries. Its first offering, the Vegan Silk Technology Platform, includes b-silk and xl-silk, which are fully biodegradable, film-forming ingredients for the beauty industry. The company sells these products to beauty and personal care manufacturers.
sellsTo: cosmetic manufacturers in the prestige and mass market segments

exposures.sentence: Our first offering, the Vegan Silk Technology Platform currently includes b-silk and xl-silk, which are fully biodegradable, film-forming, versatile and functional ingredient for the beauty industry.
Bolt harnesses biotechnology to build biomaterials that aims to disrupt and transform high-volume consumer goods industries.

catalysts.sentence: Furthermore, Laurus Bio is undergoing capacity expansion by building a third facility, which is expected to add substantial capacity to its current capacity by the second half of 2026.
Currently, we are in the process of validating a second supplier, and evaluating a third supplier.

The Company has 180 calendar days from receipt of letters, or until August 11, 2025 in which to regain compliance.

catalysts.event: Triton equity facility commitment period end
catalysts.sentence: we have the ability, subject to specified limits, to require Triton to purchase up to $1.5 million in shares of our Common Stock between the date that a Form S-1 registration statement becomes effective for the resale of such shares of common stock (the Registration Statement) and June 30, 2025 (the Commitment Period).
the Sponsor shall (i) use its commercially reasonable efforts to provide or organize financing for us in an amount of $10 million to close by August 13, 2025 (the Financing)
The Triton Warrant will be exercisable beginning August 13, 2025

tamClaims.claim: The overall market Bolt serves is expected to grow at a compound annual rate of 7.7% to reach $973 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The overall market Bolt serves is expected to grow at a compound annual rate of 7.7% to reach $973 billion by 2030 according to Grandview Research.

tamClaims.claim: The global silicone market is estimated to be between $16.7 billion and $19.9 billion, with the silicone elastomers subsector representing a $6.3 billion to $10.0 billion global market.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Global Market Insights, the global silicone market is estimated to be between $16.7 billion and $19.9 billion, with the silicone elastomers subsector representing a $6.3 billion to $10.0 billion global market.

tamClaims.claim: A total of 390,000 tons of silicone products are sold annually in the personal care and consumer products sector.
tamClaims.sentence: The Global Silicone Council has indicated that a total of 390,000 tons of silicone products are sold each year in the personal care and consumer products sector.
